use_cases: Expandable FAQ sections with scroll-triggered content reveals
Help center and documentation disclosure patterns
Support pages with animated question-answer reveals
Product feature explanations with smooth animations
ai_summary: A scroll-animated FAQ accordion component built with Radix UI, Framer Motion, and GSAP ScrollTrigger. Features expandable question-answer pairs with smooth expand/collapse interactions and scroll-triggered content reveals. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with Lucide icons for visual indicators.
